meta.title: DOGS - Modern Svelte Template
meta.description: A lightweight, high-performance, responsive Svelte template with TailwindCSS, SCSS, and Multi-Language, Localization, and Internationalization (abbrev. i18n).

app.title: WE ARE DOGS
app.tagline: A premium, minimalist Svelte boilerplate crafted for speed and responsiveness.
app.intro: This template is built by CaptainBrando for the homies. Fully optimized, lightweight, and ready for deployment.

features.i18n_desc: Built-in localization with svelte-i18n supporting async loaded dictionary files.
features.responsive_desc: Agile layout styles that seamlessly scale from mobile screens up to TVs.
features.styles_desc: Powered by Tailwind CSS v4 and modular SCSS styles.
